settings.heading: Help customers choose the right fit before printing.
settings.text: Add exact measurements after you choose suppliers and receive samples. This template is ready for apparel sizing guidance.

settings.question: How to measure
settings.answer: Measure a similar product that fits well, then compare chest, length, shoulder, and sleeve measurements against the product size chart.

settings.question: Oversized fit
settings.answer: Oversized products are intentionally relaxed. Add exact garment measurements and model references after sample testing.

settings.question: Between two sizes
settings.answer: For a relaxed look, size up. For a closer fit, choose the smaller size. Replace this with supplier-specific guidance.

settings.heading: Replace starter copy with real measurements.
settings.text: Accurate size charts reduce exchanges and customer confusion, especially for custom printed apparel.
